tier_prompt.no_tiers: No tiers configured. Add tiers in Admin → Verified before verifying users.

verification_prompt.note_placeholder: Optional — recorded in the audit log

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

settings.heading: Verification
settings.verified_sublabel: Your identity has been confirmed by an administrator.
settings.pending_sublabel: An administrator will get back to you soon.
settings.avatar_locked_sublabel: Verified accounts can't change their avatar. Submit a new verification request to update it.

avatar.locked_tooltip: Your avatar is locked because your account is verified. Submit a new verification request to change it.
avatar.locked_help: Verified accounts can't change their avatar. Submit a new verification request to update it.
avatar.locked_alert: Your avatar is locked because your account is verified.
avatar.request_change_confirm: This will revoke your current verification so you can update your avatar. You'll need to submit a new verification request afterwards. Continue?
avatar.request_change_success: Your verification was revoked. You can now change your avatar — submit a new verification request when you're done.
avatar.request_change_failed: Could not revoke your verification. Please try again.

user_controls.verify_prompt: Optional note for the audit log:
user_controls.revoke_prompt: Reason for revocation (visible in the audit log):
user_controls.verify_failed: Could not verify the user. Please try again.
user_controls.revoke_failed: Could not revoke verification. Please try again.

request_modal.title: Request verification
request_modal.intro: Tell us why your account should be verified. An administrator will review your request.
request_modal.reason_label: Why should this account be verified?
request_modal.reason_placeholder: Optional — share context that might help (notable role, public profile, organization, etc.)
request_modal.document_help: PNG, JPG, WEBP or PDF. Max 8 MB. Documents are stored privately and only seen by administrators.
request_modal.choose_file_hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or PDF · max 8 MB

preview.helper: Live preview — this is how the badge will appear next to a user's name.

settings.section_appearance_help: Customize how the verified badge looks across your forum.
settings.section_behaviour_help: Control what users must provide and what they can change after being verified.
settings.requests_open_help: When off, the "Request verification" button is hidden and the API rejects new submissions. Existing pending requests can still be approved or rejected.
settings.show_tooltip_help: When enabled, hovering the badge shows a card with verification details. Disable for a silent badge.
settings.require_document_help: Users must upload an identity document (RG, CPF, passport, etc.) when requesting verification.
settings.retention_help: Choose what happens to uploaded documents once a verification request is approved or rejected. Some communities must keep them for legal/audit reasons; others must delete them to comply with privacy regulations.
settings.retention_delete_after_days: Delete files after a number of days
settings.retention_days_help: Number of days to keep the document after the request is handled. A daily scheduled task purges files older than this. Min 1, max 3650.
settings.lock_avatar_help: Verified users cannot change their avatar. They must submit a new verification request to update it.
settings.badge_size_help: Multiplier relative to the surrounding text. 1.0 matches the username; higher values make the badge stand out more.
settings.custom_svg_help: Upload an SVG to replace the default Twitter-style badge. Use fill="currentColor" so the color above is honoured. Scripts and event handlers are stripped automatically.

tiers.section_help: Create and configure the badges available on your forum (blue, gold, partner, etc.). Each tier has its own color, popover description and "Learn more" link. Tier order is the priority when multiple auto-grant groups fire at once.
tiers.empty: You haven't configured any tiers yet. Create one to start verifying users.
tiers.badge_toggle_help: Override the global verified badge with an SVG of your choice — colored to match this tier.
tiers.badge_dropzone_subtitle: Click to choose a file (max 8 KB)
tiers.badge_svg_too_large: The SVG is too large (max 8 KB).
tiers.preview_hint: Hover the badge to see the actual popover
tiers.learn_more_open: Open link in a new tab
tiers.remove_confirm: Remove this tier? Users who held it will fall back to the default tier until reassigned.
tiers.id_help: Slug-style identifier. Lowercase letters, numbers, _ and - only (up to 32 chars). Cannot be changed later without reassigning users.
tiers.description_placeholder: e.g. This account has been verified by an administrator.
tiers.description_help: Shown in the popover when hovering the badge. Up to 320 characters. Use the buttons to highlight words in the tier color.
tiers.learn_more_help: https:// URL pointing to your verification policy. Empty = no link is shown in the popover.
tiers.auto_groups_help: Members of these groups receive this tier with no manual approval needed. When a user belongs to groups across multiple tiers, the tier listed first wins.

settings.section_document_types_help: Manage the document types users can pick when requesting verification. The default list (RG, CPF, Passport, Driver's license, Other) reflects Brazilian context — feel free to rename or replace it for your own forum.
settings.document_types_empty: No document types configured. Users won't see any options when uploading a document.

encryption.section_help: Encrypt uploaded identity documents at rest. The private key is generated here, but you must paste it into config.php manually — the server never stores it. Without the private key in place, encrypted documents cannot be decrypted.

status.libsodium_missing: libsodium is not available on this PHP installation. Install it to enable document encryption.
status.healthy: Encryption is active. New uploads are sealed with the configured public key, and downloads decrypt transparently.
status.not_setup: Encryption is not set up. New uploads will be stored unencrypted.
status.private_missing_body: A public key is configured but the matching private key was not found in config.php. Existing encrypted documents are unreadable until you restore the private key. Add the entry shown below to config.php, or remove the public key below to generate a new keypair (this permanently deletes every encrypted document on disk).
status.mismatch_title: Public and private keys do not match
status.mismatch_body: The private key in config.php does not belong to the public key currently saved in settings. Encryption looks set up but every decryption would fail — existing encrypted documents are unreadable. Replace the private key in config.php with the one matching the saved public key, or remove the public key below to generate a fresh pair (this permanently deletes every encrypted document on disk).

public_key.label: Current public key
public_key.help_healthy: Encryption is active. New uploads are sealed with this key. Removing it generates a fresh keypair and permanently deletes every encrypted document already on disk.
public_key.help_broken: Removing this public key generates a fresh keypair and permanently deletes every encrypted document on disk.

reveal_modal.title: Save your private key
reveal_modal.intro: This is the only time the private key will be displayed. Paste it into your forum's config.php now — the server does not keep a copy.
reveal_modal.warning_body: If you lose it before placing it in config.php, every document encrypted with the matching public key becomes unrecoverable.
reveal_modal.snippet_label: Add this line to the array in config.php:
reveal_modal.confirm_saved: I have saved this in config.php and confirmed the file is readable by PHP.
reveal_modal.confirm_hint: Please confirm above that you've saved the key before closing.
reveal_modal.orphaned: {count} previously encrypted document(s) are being deleted in the background.

regenerate_modal.title: Generate a new keypair?
regenerate_modal.warning: This will permanently delete every encrypted document currently on disk. The plaintext content cannot be recovered without the original private key. Verification rows for affected requests will keep their audit trail but their document files will be gone.
regenerate_modal.acknowledge: I understand that all currently encrypted documents will be permanently deleted.

requests.title: Verification requests
requests.description: Review and act on verification requests submitted by users.
requests.truncated: {hidden} more requests not shown — refine your filters or check the Approved tab.
requests.auto_via_group_unknown: Verified automatically through a group permission.
requests.preview_unavailable: This file format can't be previewed.
requests.approve_prompt: Optional note for the audit log:
requests.reject_prompt: Reason for rejection (shown to the user):
requests.revoke_prompt: Reason for revocation (shown in the audit log):
requests.load_failed: Could not load verification requests. Please try again.
requests.load_approved_failed: Could not load approved users. Please try again.
requests.decide_failed: Could not save the decision. Please try again.
requests.revoke_user_failed: Could not revoke verification. Please try again.
requests.generate_keypair_failed: Could not generate keypair. Please try again.

html.body:
Hi {username},

Your account on {forumTitle} has been verified by an administrator. The verified badge is now displayed next to your name across the forum.
html.preview: Your account on {forumTitle} has been verified.

plain.body:
Hi {username},

Your account on {forumTitle} has been verified by an administrator. The verified badge is now displayed next to your name across the forum.

gdpr.export_description: Verification requests, the identity documents you submitted (RG, CPF, passport, etc.), and your current verified status. Includes any verification requests you handled as an administrator.
gdpr.anonymize_description: Submitted identity documents are deleted. Reason text and administrator notes are stripped from your verification requests, but the audit trail (status and dates) is kept so other forum data referencing it stays consistent.
gdpr.delete_description: All your verification requests and uploaded identity documents are permanently deleted. Your verified status is reset.

api.already_pending: There is already a pending verification request for this user.
api.already_handled: This verification request has already been handled.
api.requests_closed: New verification requests are not being accepted at the moment.
api.document_required: An identity document is required to request verification.
api.upload_failed: The document could not be saved. Please try again.
api.file_too_large: The document is too large (8 MB maximum).
api.user_missing: The associated user no longer exists.
api.avatar_locked: Your avatar is locked because your account is verified. Submit a new verification request to update it.
api.self_revoked_note: Verification revoked by the user (avatar change request).

encryption.libsodium_missing: libsodium is not available on this PHP installation.
encryption.acknowledge_loss_required: You must acknowledge that all existing encrypted documents will be deleted before generating a new keypair.
encryption.private_key_missing: This document is encrypted, but the private key is not configured in config.php on this server. Add it under the key 'verified-private-key', or regenerate the keypair (which will delete every encrypted document).
encryption.decryption_failed: This document is encrypted and could not be decrypted. The private key in config.php may not match the saved public key, or the file is corrupted.

badge_svg.missing: No SVG file was uploaded in the "verified-badge" field.
badge_svg.upload_failed: The SVG upload failed. Please try again.
badge_svg.bad_extension: The uploaded file must have an .svg extension.
badge_svg.bad_mime: Unsupported MIME type for SVG upload.
badge_svg.too_large: The SVG file is too large (256 KB maximum).
